creator: t_uemura@macome.co.jp
text:
Did a thorough bisecting and finally pinned down a particular commit which involved my unionfs mount to break. The commit is git rev. 7a2452308633ad62081f641b2fc8751dab49106c, made by Mr. Konstantin Belousov on 23 Apr. 2021.
https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/sys?h=stable/13&id=7a2452308633ad62081f641b2fc8751dab49106c

Can someone please look into this regression and confirm/resolve the issue.
